creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #0)

> See also https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/822 if you don't like massive rebuilds after ABI-compatible updates.

Thanks. -S with poudriere-devel still behaves as described in #806, yet the
workaround in #806 no longer cleanly applies. Do you have the rebased workaround?
